contract.time_window_semantics: report summarizes the full analysis slice; growth components compare later vs earlier chronological half-window when available
contract.ranking_semantics: rows ranked by issue_pressure_proxy descending; issue_pressure_proxy sums severity-weighted and evidence-weighted issue facts
contract.delta_semantics: delta_kind=intra_window_delta in v1.1; growth_delta_mentions is later-half minus earlier-half distinct mention count for the issue class
contract.unresolved_handling: target unresolved state does not suppress issue inclusion; null issue classes are excluded
contract.intended_use: ranking issue pressure with severity and evidence context
contract.anti_use: not a verified incident rate or a causal root-cause diagnosis

contract.time_window_semantics: report summarizes the current analysis slice at root thread grain
contract.delta_semantics: no cross-window delta; component values are same-slice structural and polarity-conflict proxies
contract.unresolved_handling: entity or topic unresolved states do not affect controversy scoring
contract.intended_use: surfacing threads that may merit analyst review for conflict-heavy conversational structure
contract.anti_use: not a validated misinformation, harm, or public-safety metric

contract.grain: creator(author_id), thread initiator(author_id), and source platform rows
contract.time_window_semantics: report summarizes the full analysis slice
contract.ranking_semantics: rows ranked by volume descending within each grouping family
contract.delta_semantics: no delta in v1; report focuses on current-slice contribution shares and associations
contract.unresolved_handling: entity or topic unresolved states do not suppress creator or source inclusion; association fields skip null labels
contract.intended_use: understanding who is contributing conversation volume and on which channels
contract.anti_use: not influence, audience reach, or creator quality

contract.time_window_semantics: cards inherit the analysis slice and report filters from their source BI reports
contract.ranking_semantics: cards are generated from report-level priority conditions, not raw-mart top-k alone
contract.delta_semantics: cards reuse the delta semantics of the source reports they summarize
contract.unresolved_handling: cards preserve unresolved handling from the source reports and do not reinterpret it independently
contract.intended_use: business-facing narrative summaries with evidence and confidence
contract.anti_use: not a substitute for inspecting underlying report rows or raw evidence
